text: A photograph of a cloudy sky over a city street scene. The sky is filled with large, dark, and white clouds, with patches of blue visible. Below the sky, there are several buildings, including a large white building on the left with a blue sign, and a multi-story building on the right. Several tall trees are visible between the buildings. In the foreground, there are temporary structures covered by blue and black tarps, suggesting a market or temporary setup.
